evals.prompt: 這張結構配置圖有哪些構件？請解讀
evals.expected_output: Should trigger plan-reader + plan-reader-elements. Produce structured summary with grid system, columns, beams, walls, slabs identified from the plan image.

evals.prompt: 這個案子是 24F/B6，幫我對應ETABS樓層
evals.expected_output: Should trigger plan-reader + plan-reader-floors. Explain +1 floor rule, story naming, and produce floor mapping table.

evals.prompt: 我有一份 Bluebeam PDF 的結構配置圖，幫我用 pdf_annot_extractor 提取標註後解讀
evals.expected_output: Should trigger plan-reader. Execute extraction command, read annotation.json, map annotations to structural components, output structured summary.
